sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: no clear network-effect indicators in available data

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins slightly above industry average; operating margin 32% vs 15% (extreme efficiency); significant scale ($29B revenue)

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: insufficient data for efficient scale assessment

analysis: Switching Costs and Cost Advantage provide some competitive protection, but not all moat sources are fully developed. The company has defensible advantages that should persist for several years but may face erosion over time.
